message:
refactor(websocket): replace clear() with pop_front eviction in pong queue

Extract shared `enqueue_pending_pong()` helper in both server.rs and
split.rs that caps the pending-pong VecDeque at MAX_PENDING_PONGS (16).
When the queue is full the oldest entry is evicted via pop_front()
instead of clearing the entire queue, preserving recent pong payloads
that the peer may still be waiting on.

Both modules also gain unit tests (`pong_eviction_replaces_oldest`)
that verify FIFO eviction semantics: after enqueueing MAX+1 pongs the
first payload is dropped and the second-oldest becomes the new front.

- server.rs: new `enqueue_pending_pong()` fn, test module
- split.rs:  same pattern applied to WriterState, test module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
